productDisplayName: Puma Men Complete Vectana 2 Black Sports Shoes
description: Round toed black sports shoes with central lace up Mesh upper with synthetic overlays, reinforced overlay at the heel collar Form stripes and Puma cat on one side, branding on the tongue and heel collar Ortholite sockliner, padded inner and tongue IdCell enhances the ride while offering great cushioning EverRide rubber outsole with decoupled heel construction DuoCell technology which combines durable cushioning and stability and ArchTech provides arch support which increases firmness Ortholite sockliner consist of layer for maximum fit and comfort Tough rubber outer with grooves
